business_ideas.idea: Premium unique short-term rental properties with strong brand and storytelling
Houseboat rentals (FloHome model) with 360 water views in marina locations
Treehouse rentals on private land with unique design and hospitality
Shipping container homes as premium short-term rentals
Water feature creation (dams, pools) as resort amenity centerpiece
Automation software for hospitality management with owner mentality

predictions.text: Commoditized Airbnbs will be replaced by one-of-a-kind branded properties with storytelling
Premium hospitality focusing on design and emotional connection will command 5x price premiums
